calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Property To Be Titled In Name Of Trust
Off Calendar Feb-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jill Rowe for Vikram Arora (petitioner).
Kim Meierotto (reporter) appeared by zoom.

The court stated that it reviewed the petition, that it thought it was well framed, that it is has had a few petitions like this and that it is aware of the practices in the oncology community related to sperm donations when someone is going to have treatments that are going destroy their ability to do this later. The court also informed counsel that it was going to pre-grant this petition, but it left it on calendar to see if anyone was going to come forward and object. When asked if anyone was objecting to this petition, no one came forward. Mrs. Rowe stated that Mr. Arora was diagnosed in January 2021, that he created a trust one year later that said he wanted his sperm to go into the trust, and that they think it was his intent and that he wanted his brother to control this/make those calls. The Petition for Order Determining Property to Be Titled in Name of Trust is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Reporter: Kim Meierotto, CSR #11602, 510-866-8138, kimcsr@comcast.net
